runs.text:
2 Zilhaj 2025 | Izzat, Shan o Shaukat Ka Safar | 2nd Qeemti Raat | Ubqari Zilhajja Special Series

2 Zilhaj 2025 ki is doosri qeemti raat mein, Izzat, Shan o Shaukat ka Taqatwar Amal hasil karein. Zilhajja ki 10 mubarak ratoon mein se har raat ek naya roohani raaz lekar aati hai. Is khas video mein Ubqari aapko bataye ga ke kaise aap apni zindagi mein izzat aur badshahat hasil kar sakte hain Allah ke qareeb hokar.

Rozana dekhiye Ubqari Zilhajja Special Series — 10 Ratein, 10 Waseelay, 10 Hajatein!

Sheikh-Ul-Wazaif's Sons & Spiritual Heirs 
Pir Rumi Ubqari 
Pir Shibli Ubqari 
Pir Ghazali Ubqari

subtitle.simpleText:
Welcome to our captivating podcast where we delve into the enigmatic world of black magic. In this episode, we explore the ancient and mysterious practices of black magic, uncovering its secrets and the rituals involved. But that's not all – we also provide essential insights on how to protect yourself from its dark influences.

Join us as we:

✨ Unveil the history and origins of black magic.
🌀 Discuss various techniques and spells associated with black magic.
🛡️ Offer powerful protective measures and counter-spells to safeguard yourself.
🔮 Share real-life stories and experiences from those who have encountered black magic.

Whether you're curious about the mystical arts or seeking ways to shield yourself from malevolent forces, this podcast is your ultimate guide. Don't miss out on this thrilling journey into the occult!

🔔 Subscribe to our channel and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest episodes.

🎧 Tune in now and embark on a fascinating exploration of black magic and its defenses!

channelMetadataRenderer.title: Ubqari
channelMetadataRenderer.description:
Sheikh ul Wazaif’s videos on authentic Islamic recitations (Wazaif), spiritual acts (A’maal), and tips authenticated by the Quran, Hadith, and the lives of our Pious Predecessors. Subscribe to see more Wazaif, tips, and spiritual acts on your feed!
About:
Ubqari institute is a world-renowned organization founded by the Islamic Spiritual Scholar Hazrat Hakeem Muhammad Tariq Mahmood Chughtai DB otherwise known as ‘Sheikh-ul-Wazaif’. Our Mission is to provide humanitarian and spiritual services worldwide,regardless of religion, creed, or nationality.
About SheikhUlWazaif
Hazrat Hakeem Muhammad Tariq Mahmood Chughtai is one of the most Influential Spiritual Leaders in the 21st Century, his weekly Spiritual lectures are listened to in over 200 countries worldwide and are followed by millions of people on various social media channels. In 1991, he was made the Spiritual Heir of the 5 chains of Tasawwuf including Qadri, Chisti, Suhrawardi,   Naqshbandi and Shazli by the permissions of Saints
